case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. VS. VIRGINIA HAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $300.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 200005948) AS TO DEFENDANT HAN, VIRGINIA
STATEMENT OF ACCOUNT (TRANSACTION ID # 200005948) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAN, VIRGINIA $6,008.28 PRINCIPAL, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,308.28, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 200005948)
DECLARATION 1033 (TRANSACTION ID # 200005948) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200002870), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. SERVED NOV-15-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE NOV-18-2019 AS TO DEFENDANT HAN, VIRGINIA

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT HAN, VIRGINIA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-05-2020
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 200005948) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
